dialogues: It seemed like all we did was fight and make love, fight and make love, fight and make love.
That's it? That's- No, no, no, no.
And now you have to follow through.
She is not a girl. She's a woman.
You're right, you're right. Okay. I'm sorry.
Kids? [Sighs] Phil, would you get them? [Video Game Sounds]
Okay. If that's what you really want to do. Seriously.
to make the same bad mistakes I made.
- He tripped him, Jay. Where's the penalty? - [Whistle Blows]
koreanHints: 1. 싸우고 사랑하고, 싸우고 사랑하고, 싸우고 사랑하고 그런 것만 했던 것 같아요.
3. 내가 했던 것과 똑같은 나쁜 실수를 하는 것.
sessions.keyExpressions:
💡 핵심 표현:
- all we did was : ~하는 것밖에 하지 않았다. 과거의 반복적이고 단조로운 행동을 강조할 때 쓰는 표현
- follow through : 시작한 일을 끝까지 해내다, 약속을 지키다. 중도 포기하지 않고 완수한다는 의미
- make the same mistake : 같은 실수를 반복하다. 과거의 잘못을 되풀이한다는 뜻으로 자주 쓰임
